Lyrics: i don’t respond right away
not because i don’t have an answer
but because most things don’t hold up
if you just let them sit for a second
i’ve noticed that
people fill silence with noise
and call it truth
but if you wait long enough
what’s real doesn’t change
so i wait.
i let things repeat
i let people show themselves twice
before I decide what it actually means.
first version of anything
is usually incomplete
i don’t trust what’s said
i trust what’s true
there’s always something underneath
something quieter, something hidden
something people don’t mean to show
that’s the part i pay attention to
so when i finally move
it looks sudden
like it came from nowhere
when it didn’t
it’s been building the whole time
i just didn’t say anything
i don’t need to be first
i don’t need to be heard
i just need to understand
what i’m dealing with
and once i do
There's no hesitation.
i don’t think people realize that
by the time i act
i’ve already made the decision
there’s no debate left
no second guessing
just execution
i’m not quiet because i have nothing to say
i’m quiet because i haven’t decided yet
but that’s not all I am.
i don’t just sit in silence
waiting to understand
Sometimes i already know
when i do
i don’t slow down not for anyone
things i don’t tolerate
patterns i’ve seen too many times
When it hits that point
there’s no process
just action
i’m not built to hesitate forever
i’m built to decide
i don’t follow pressure
i don’t follow noise
if it doesn’t sit right
i don’t force it to
i’d rather stand alone
Than blindly follow
i’m still the same
i don’t change for the room
i don’t change for comfort
i stay consistent
even when everything else doesn’t
i don’t need to prove who i am
because I don't question it!
